What We Do

Expert Services Tailored
to Your Tax Needs

Whether you're filing as an individual or running a business, we have the expertise to maximize your return and minimize your stress.

👤
Personal

Individual Tax Preparation

We handle every detail of your personal tax return — from W-2s and investments to rental income and self-employment — so you get every deduction you deserve.

  • Federal & Ohio state returns
  • Investment & capital gains reporting
  • Self-employed & freelancer returns
  • Deduction maximization strategy
  • Prior-year amendment filings
🏢
Business

Business Tax Services

From small businesses to growing enterprises, we provide comprehensive tax planning, filing, and compliance services that protect your bottom line all year long.

  • S-Corp, LLC & partnership returns
  • Quarterly estimated tax payments
  • Business deduction & expense planning
  • Entity structure consultation
  • Year-round tax strategy support

TaxWise Ohio found deductions I had been missing for three years. I wish I'd found them sooner.

— Maria T., Cincinnati

A+ BBB Rating
Why Choose Us

Tax Expertise with a
Personal Touch

We're not a seasonal pop-up shop. We're your year-round tax partner, rooted right here in Ohio.

🏆

Ohio-Focused Expertise

Deep knowledge of Ohio tax law, local credits, and state-specific deductions that out-of-state firms routinely miss.

🔒

100% Accuracy Guarantee

If we make an error, we pay the penalty fees. Your filing is reviewed by a licensed CPA before submission — every time.

📞

Year-Round Support

Questions after April? We're still here. Clients get direct access to their tax advisor 12 months a year.

How It Works

Get Started in 4 Simple Steps

No jargon, no hassle. Just a straightforward path to a perfectly filed return.

1

Free Consult

Book a no-obligation call. We learn your situation and answer your questions.

2

Gather Documents

We send you a simple checklist — upload securely through our client portal.

3

Expert Review

A licensed CPA prepares and thoroughly reviews your return for maximum savings.

4

File & Relax

We file on your behalf and keep your records archived safely for future reference.
